allow: Bash(grep -n "renderT1AudioBlock\(g\);\\|id: \\"audio\\", type: \\"choice\\", style: \\"tf\\", icon: \\"fa-circle-question\\",\\\\s*$\\|title: \\"Audio: Rost yoki yolg\\|t1-audio-placeholder { margin-top:16" paid-courses/b1-course.html)

Bash(grep -n "topic.topic7Exercises || topic.topic8Exercises\\|topic7Exercises || topic.topic8Exercises\) { renderTopic1\\|checkTopic8Exercises = window\\|g.id === .audio.. html += renderT1AudioBlock" paid-courses/b1-course.html)

PowerShell($f='a1-demo.html'; "MD5: " + \(Get-FileHash $f -Algorithm MD5\).Hash; "Lines: " + \(Get-Content $f | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; "--- lines 68-90 ---"; Get-Content $f | Select-Object -Skip 67 -First 23)

Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\("fs"\);for\(const f of ["b2-demo.html","paid-courses/b2-course.html"]\){const html=fs.readFileSync\(f,"utf8"\);const re=/<script\(?![^>]*\\bsrc=\)\(?![^>]*type=["\\x27]module\)[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/gi;let m,found=false;while\(\(m=re.exec\(html\)\)\){const body=m[1];if\(body.indexOf\("completeTopicHandler"\)===-1\)continue;found=true;try{new Function\(body\);console.log\(f+": SCRIPT OK"\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(f+": SYNTAX ERROR -> "+e.message\);}}console.log\(f+": msg="+html.includes\("Iltimos, barcha mashqlarni bajaring."\)+" guard="+html.includes\("showB2CompletionBlocked"\)\);}')

Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\("fs"\);for\(const f of ["b2-demo.html","paid-courses/b2-course.html"]\){const html=fs.readFileSync\(f,"utf8"\);const re=/<script\(?![^>]*\\bsrc=\)\(?![^>]*type=["\\x27]module\)[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/gi;let m;while\(\(m=re.exec\(html\)\)\){const body=m[1];if\(body.indexOf\("completeTopicHandler"\)===-1\)continue;try{new Function\(body\);console.log\(f+": SCRIPT OK"\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(f+": SYNTAX ERROR -> "+e.message\);}}console.log\(f+": msg="+html.includes\("Iltimos, barcha mashqlarni bajaring."\)+" guard="+html.includes\("showB2CompletionBlocked"\)\);}')

Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\("fs"\);for\(const f of ["b2-demo.html","paid-courses/b2-course.html"]\){const html=fs.readFileSync\(f,"utf8"\);const re=/<script\(?![^>]*\\bsrc=\)\(?![^>]*type=["\\x27]module\)[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/gi;let m;while\(\(m=re.exec\(html\)\)\){const body=m[1];if\(body.indexOf\("completeTopicHandler"\)===-1\)continue;try{new Function\(body\);console.log\(f+": OK"\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(f+": ERR "+e.message\);}}console.log\(f+": msg="+html.includes\("Iltimos, barcha mashqlarni bajaring."\)+" guard="+html.includes\("showB2CompletionBlocked"\)\);}')

Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\("fs"\);for\(const f of ["b2-demo.html","paid-courses/b2-course.html"]\){const html=fs.readFileSync\(f,"utf8"\);const re=/<script\(?![^>]*\\bsrc=\)\(?![^>]*type=["\\x27]module\)[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/gi;let m,syn="NO-HANDLER";while\(\(m=re.exec\(html\)\)\){const body=m[1];if\(body.indexOf\("completeTopicHandler"\)===-1\)continue;try{new Function\(body\);syn="OK";}catch\(e\){syn="ERR "+e.message;}}console.log\("\\n"+f\);console.log\("  syntax="+syn\);console.log\("  msg="+html.includes\("Iltimos, barcha mashqlarni bajaring."\)\);console.log\("  guard="+html.includes\("showB2CompletionBlocked"\)\);console.log\("  bypassRemoved="+!/completeTopicHandler = async function\\\(topicId\\\) \\{\\s*await saveProgress/.test\(html\)\);}')

PowerShell($p = "paid-courses\\b1-vocabulary.html"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); "First 8 bytes: " + \(\($bytes[0..7] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\('X2'\) }\) -join ' '\); "Total bytes: $\($bytes.Length\)"; $txt = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($p\); "Char length: $\($txt.Length\)"; "Contains Poppins: $\($txt.Contains\('Poppins'\)\)"; "Contains 'topic': $\($txt.ToLower\(\).Contains\('topic'\)\)"; "Contains cyrillic dobry: $\($txt.Contains\([char]0x0434\)\)")
